generated_exposure.exposure_text:
Did you know that countries investing in strategic autonomy actually see a 20% increase in civil liberties violations? 🇪🇺📉

While self-sufficiency sounds appealing, the reality is that over-reliance on domestic solutions often leads to reduced public preparedness. A balanced approach with strong alliances ensures both security AND freedoms. #NationalSecurity #CivilLiberties

Source: [European Policy Review, 2025]
